description_long: This chair features a sleek, minimalist design with a seat and backrest crafted from a single piece of curved, dark wood veneer. The wood grain is horizontally aligned, giving the chair a modern and elegant appearance. The seat and backrest are gently contoured for ergonomic comfort, with the backrest flaring slightly outward at the top. Supporting the seat are four slender, tubular metal legs finished in a matte gray, providing stability while maintaining a lightweight look. The absence of armrests and the open space beneath the seat enhance its contemporary style. This chair is well-suited for urban environments such as cafes, waiting areas, or public parks.
description: A modern chair with a curved dark wood seat and backrest, supported by four slim gray metal legs. Its minimalist design and lack of armrests make it ideal for contemporary urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, slightly flared backrest and the smooth, continuous wood grain of the seat, with two front metal legs visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the thin profile of the seat and backrest, as well as the gentle curve and ergonomic contouring.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full width of the backrest and the alignment of the back legs, emphasizing the chair's stability.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the seat's thickness and the clean, uninterrupted wood surface.
